results.title: Architectural trade-offs should be validated against acceptance tests during design review
results.summary: Validate architectural invariants against acceptance tests early in design phase to surface conflicts before implementation.
results.applicability_to_v109: HIGH — v109 is COMPLEX-1 refactoring with multiple architectural trade-offs (API contract changes, DB schema evolution, DSP constant sweep). Early AC validation against design will surface gaps before implementation.
results.recommendation: APPLICABLE — Apply this pattern to v109 design phase: validate all refactored API endpoints with acceptance criteria before design seal.

results.title: Route blocking file I/O off shared asyncio event loops
results.summary: Synchronous file writes, large reads, and subprocess-backed post-processing inside async functions block the entire shared event loop.
results.applicability_to_v109: HIGH — v109 includes API/DB/DSP hotspots that may involve subprocess calls. This is directly relevant to async hygiene (v108 addressed BL-661/699/700); v109 must maintain this invariant.
results.recommendation: APPLICABLE — During v109 refactoring of scan.py, waveform.py, qc_service.py, tts_service.py, ensure no new blocking I/O on shared event loop.

results.title: Confine filesystem paths derived from external identifiers to their intended base
results.summary: Any feature converting external identifier/user value into filesystem path must confine resolved path strictly under intended base.
results.applicability_to_v109: CRITICAL — v108 closed BL-699/700 (scan path confinement). v109 must NOT regress this during COMPLEX-1 refactoring. Relevant to scan.py, asset upload, any new path-handling logic.
results.recommendation: MANDATORY REGRESSION GUARD — Add to v109 design ACs: 'All filesystem path operations from external IDs must pass path-confinement validation consistently across all call sites.'

pr_promotion_review.note: Version-age = current_version(109) - pr_creation_version. Sorted by creation date (oldest first). Threshold: 5+ versions open.

promotion_decisions.title: Standardize curl example placeholders and validation in documentation
promotion_decisions.rationale: Documentation-only, post-v039 artifact. Not actionable in v109 (COMPLEX-1 code refactoring). Bundle into post-v109 doc cycle.

promotion_decisions.title: Clarify E2E Test Directory Path in Documentation
promotion_decisions.rationale: Long-standing doc issue (v053). v109 not a test-harness phase. Defer to v110+ doc audit.

promotion_decisions.title: Firefox focus trap false positive in workspace (J604)
promotion_decisions.rationale: Browser-compat (GUI). v109 is backend refactoring. Defer to post-v109 GUI cycle.

promotion_decisions.title: WebKit skip-link programmatic focus (J604/J605)
promotion_decisions.rationale: WebKit accessibility fix. v109 backend refactoring. Defer to post-v109 GUI cycle.

promotion_decisions.title: WebKit URL workspace routing timing race (J602)
promotion_decisions.rationale: WebKit browser-compat. v109 backend scope. Defer to post-v109 GUI cycle.

promotion_decisions.title: Document asyncio.wait pending-set drain in AGENTS.md (Windows guard)
promotion_decisions.rationale: Process/doc improvement (AGENTS.md). v109 code refactoring, not process redesign. Related to LRN-842. Defer to v110+ AGENTS.md updates.

promotion_decisions.title: Add contract-asserting tests for architectural invariants
promotion_decisions.rationale: Quality-gates testing infrastructure. v109 is refactoring, not testing-harness design. Promote to BL in v110+ quality-gates cycle.

promotion_decisions.title: Implement real-FFmpeg smoke test CI tier for behavioral AC discharge
promotion_decisions.rationale: CI/testing infrastructure. Accumulated from v069. v109 COMPLEX-1 refactoring does not include CI lanes. Promote to BL in v110+ infrastructure cycle.

promotion_decisions.title: Add pre-flight scope gate to reduce execution-agent overrun
promotion_decisions.rationale: Process improvement (design-phase gate). v079 investigated-raise. v109 not a process-redesign phase. Address in auto-dev-mcp framework (BL-1144). Defer to v110+.

promotion_decisions.title: Extend SPDX header policy to frontend (.ts/.tsx/.js/.css)
promotion_decisions.rationale: License/header hygiene follow-on (GUI scope). Deferred from v083 intentionally. v109 backend refactoring. Re-evaluate in v110+ post-backend-SPDX.

summary.rationale: All top-10 items (all version_age >= 56) are documentation, GUI, CI infrastructure, or process improvements — orthogonal to v109's COMPLEX-1 API/DB/DSP refactoring scope. Deferral is correct triage.
summary.backlog_status: 13 open BL items cross-searched (sonar-remediation-complex1 cluster). These are already in v109 backlog. BL-672 explicitly requires rebase over v108 BL-699. No promotion action needed.
v109_design_learnings_to_apply: LRN-843: Maintain filesystem path-confinement invariant (v108 BL-699/700 regression guard)
LRN-842: Route blocking I/O off event loops (async hygiene during refactoring)
LRN-226: Validate architectural trade-offs against ACs in design phase
